prompts.name: Glowing Runes
prompts.text: Add glowing runes that float or appear on surfaces with clear symbols, soft light, and controlled magical energy.

prompts.name: Energy Ring
prompts.text: Add a circular magical energy ring with elegant geometry, glowing edges, and balanced visual intensity.

prompts.name: Magic Sparkles
prompts.text: Add small magical sparkles around the subject or scene, keeping them subtle, elegant, and not too crowded.

prompts.name: Fire Spell
prompts.text: Add a controlled fire spell with warm glow, flame movement, and believable light spill.

prompts.name: Ice Spell
prompts.text: Add an ice spell effect with crystalline shapes, cool glow, frost detail, and clean structure.

prompts.name: Light Spell
prompts.text: Add a light-based spell effect with soft radiance, luminous particles, and hopeful atmosphere.

prompts.name: Dark Spell
prompts.text: Add a dark magic effect with smoky tendrils, deep violet tones, and restrained ominous energy.

prompts.name: Healing Aura
prompts.text: Add a healing aura with soft green or golden light, gentle particles, and calm restorative feeling.

prompts.name: Teleport Effect
prompts.text: Add a teleportation effect with swirling light, broken particles, and a clear sense of transition.

prompts.name: Summoning Circle
prompts.text: Add a summoning circle on the ground with glowing symbols, careful perspective, and atmospheric light.

prompts.name: Floating Books
prompts.text: Add floating books or pages moved by magic, with believable spacing and subtle motion.

prompts.name: Crystal Orbs
prompts.text: Add floating crystal orbs with internal glow, reflections, and mystical presence.

prompts.name: Wings of Light
prompts.text: Add translucent wings made of light with soft glow, elegant feather-like forms, and divine atmosphere.

prompts.name: Elemental Aura
prompts.text: Add an elemental aura matching the scene, using fire, water, earth, wind, light, or shadow with coherent styling.

prompts.name: Time Distortion
prompts.text: Add a time-distortion effect with floating clock fragments, warped light, and surreal but readable detail.
